title: acer oblongum var. oblongum
intro: Acer oblongum var. oblongum, also known as the Sikkim maple, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayas and parts of China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Acer oblongum var. oblongum include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and providing antioxidant properties. Traditional herbal preparations of Acer oblongum var. oblongum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety need further scientific research and validation.
